div.h1: Data Flow: Matrix Multiply Cache Access Locality
div.h2: Optimization: Row-Major A × Column-Major B (Tiling Primitive)

ul.li: If source matrices are Row-Major, pre-transpose Matrix B once.
Cost of O(N²) transpose is negligible compared to O(N³) multiply speedup.
Enables SIMD vectorization (AVX-512) for inner-product kernels.
Dot product needs Column j: B[0][j], B[1][j]...
Elements are N * sizeof(T) bytes apart.
Each read triggers a Cache Miss if N is large.
✗ Cache lines fetched but 93% of data unused.
Dot product needs Column j: B[0][j], B[1][j]...
